scripts.dev:clean: powershell -Command "Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.Name -eq 'node.exe' -and $_.CommandLine -match 'next' } | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.ProcessId -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Remove-Item -Recurse -Force .next -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; next dev"
